title: About the Odoo Bangladesh Community
summary: An independent, educational portal to help people learn Odoo ERP, share resources, and connect with the ecosystem in Bangladesh.

sections.title: What this platform is
sections.content: odoobangladesh.com is a community-first learning and resource hub. The goal is to make Odoo knowledge easier to discover for learners, professionals, and organizations in Bangladesh—through guides, training roadmaps, and practical implementation resources.

sections.title: What this platform is not
sections.content: This is not an official Odoo corporate website. It is an independent portal designed for education, community knowledge-sharing, and connecting people with the broader Odoo ecosystem.
